questions.q: According to an April 23, 2026 UN report, what is the primary cause behind the estimated 840,000 work-related deaths globally each year?

A ProPublica investigation published on April 23, 2026, revealed that fewer than half of the 140,000 opioid victims who filed claims will receive compensation from which pharmaceutical company's $7.4 billion settlement?

According to a scientific statement released by the American Heart Association on April 23, 2026, physical activity may be safer than previously thought for children diagnosed with what specific heart muscle disorder?

On April 23, 2026, it was reported that U.S. health officials halted the publication of a CDC study analyzing the effectiveness of which vaccine in preventing adult emergency room visits and hospitalizations?
